# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| 0.1.x   | :white_check_mark: |
| < 0.1   | :x:                |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

We take the security of BoarderframeOS seriously. If you believe you have found a security vulnerability, please report it to us as described below.

**Please do not report security vulnerabilities through public GitHub issues.**

Instead, please report them via email to: boarderframe@gmail.com

Please include the following information:
- Type of issue (e.g., buffer overflow, SQL injection, cross-site scripting, etc.)
- Full paths of source file(s) related to the issue
- Location of affected source code (tag/branch/commit or direct URL)
- Step-by-step instructions to reproduce the issue
- Proof-of-concept or exploit code (if possible)
- Impact of the issue

We will acknowledge your email within 48 hours and send a more detailed response within 5 days indicating the next steps.

## Preferred Languages

We prefer all communications to be in English.

## Disclosure Policy

When we receive a security report, we will:
1. Confirm the problem and determine affected versions
2. Audit code to find similar problems
3. Prepare fixes for all supported versions
4. Release fixes as soon as possible

## Comments on this Policy

If you have suggestions on how this process could be improved, please submit a pull request.
